message:
bench: add Criterion benchmarks for safe_channel reserve/commit protocol

Five benchmark groups measuring the cancellation-safe channel:

- try_send_recv: fire-and-forget baseline at cap 16/64/256/1024
- reserve_commit: safe path (send + reserve + commit) vs baseline
- reserve_rollback: reservation drop requeue overhead
- burst: fill-then-drain batch pattern at burst 16/64/256
- mpsc: multi-producer contention scaling at 1/2/4 producers

Quantifies the overhead of the reserve/commit protocol over plain
try_recv, and measures rollback (drop-without-commit) requeue cost.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -409,6 +409,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "scan_pipeline"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "safe_channel"
+harness = false
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "input_latency_bench"
 harness = false
